tasks.label: bundle-frontend-zip
args: npm run build; if (Test-Path 'deploy') { Remove-Item -Recurse -Force 'deploy' }; New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'deploy' | Out-Null; Copy-Item -Recurse -Force 'dist\*' 'deploy\'; Compress-Archive -Path 'deploy\*' -DestinationPath 'deploy\origin-social-frontend-upload.zip' -Force; Write-Output 'ZIP_READY=deploy/origin-social-frontend-upload.zip'

tasks.label: refresh-pages-zips
args: npm run build:pages; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; if (-not (Test-Path 'deploy')) { New-Item -ItemType Directory -Path 'deploy' | Out-Null }; Get-ChildItem 'deploy' -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Remove-Item -Recurse -Force; Copy-Item 'dist/*' 'deploy' -Recurse; if (Test-Path '_headers') { Copy-Item '_headers' 'deploy/_headers' -Force }; if (Test-Path '_redirects') { Copy-Item '_redirects' 'deploy/_redirects' -Force }; if (Test-Path 'deploy/origin-social-frontend-upload.zip') { Remove-Item 'deploy/origin-social-frontend-upload.zip' -Force }; Compress-Archive -Path 'deploy/*' -DestinationPath 'deploy/origin-social-frontend-upload.zip' -CompressionLevel Optimal -Force; Write-Output 'ZIP_READY=deploy/origin-social-frontend-upload.zip'
